old_tinker_overworld: Ah, a traveler! Haven't seen one in ages.
The scrap piles around here hold useful parts.
Watch out for Rust Golems in the eastern corridors.
sparks_overworld: Bzzt! I used to be a maintenance bot.
My circuits are a bit scrambled these days...
If you find any spare capacitors, I'd be grateful!
drifter_overworld: There's something lurking in the south tunnels.
I've heard strange sounds coming from the walls.
scout_overworld: I've mapped most of this sector.
The northwest rooms are relatively safe.
But the open areas? That's where the rats swarm.
shopkeeper: Welcome to my shop! Best repairs in the sector.
Take a look at what I've got!
engineer_factory: You made it past the Guardian? Impressive.
This factory still has working assembly lines...
Be careful deeper in. The Plasma Hounds hunt in packs.
weaponsmith: Finest blades this side of the wastes.
Every edge has a story. Pick yours.
quest_spare_parts_offer: I'm running low on parts for my repairs.
Could you gather 5 Scrap Metal for me?
I'll make it worth your while!
quest_spare_parts_active: Still looking for that Scrap Metal?
I need 5 pieces. Check the scrap piles around here.
quest_spare_parts_complete: You found all the scrap! Wonderful!
Here's your payment. Good doing business!
quest_spare_parts_done: Thanks again for the scrap. My shelves are stocked!
Let me know if you need anything.
quest_pest_control_offer: Those Scrap Rats are everywhere lately.
If you could take out 4 of them, the sector would be safer.
I'll share my supply cache as thanks.
quest_pest_control_active: Still rats skittering around out there.
Keep hunting them down. We need 4 eliminated.
quest_pest_control_complete: The sector's quieter already. Nice work!
Here, take these supplies. You've earned them.
quest_pest_control_done: Sector's been peaceful since you cleared those rats.
You're a real asset around here.
quest_deep_recon_offer: There's a cave to the south... the Scrap Cave.
I need someone to scout it and deal with the Volt Wraiths.
Visit the cave and defeat 2 Volt Wraiths. Can you handle it?
quest_deep_recon_active: Head south to the Scrap Cave.
I need you to explore it and take down 2 Volt Wraiths.
quest_deep_recon_complete: You've been to the cave AND dealt with the Wraiths?
Incredible. Take this blade I've been saving.
quest_deep_recon_done: The cave intel has been invaluable.
quest_circuit_restore_offer: Bzzt! My circuits are almost functional again!
I just need 3 Voltage Spikes to complete the restoration.
Help me out and I'll teach you a useful technique!
quest_circuit_restore_active: Bzzt... still need those Voltage Spikes.
3 of them should do the trick. You can buy them at shops.
quest_circuit_restore_complete: Bzzt-BZZT! Perfect! These are exactly what I needed!
As promised, let me upload this skill to your neural link.
quest_circuit_restore_done: Thanks to you, I'm almost like new.
quest_factory_sweep_offer: The Plasma Hounds have taken over the assembly lines.
I need you to eliminate 3 of them so I can resume work.
There's high-grade armor in it for you.
quest_factory_sweep_active: Those Plasma Hounds are still prowling around.
I need 3 of them dealt with. Watch out for their fire.
quest_factory_sweep_complete: The factory floor is clear? Outstanding!
This Titanium Aegis Plate is yours. Finest armor I've made.
quest_factory_sweep_done: The assembly lines are running again thanks to you.
If I forge anything new, you'll be the first to know.
comm_tower_sign_1: Static discharge has been reported in all sectors.
comm_tower_sign_2: This facility once broadcast signals across the wasteland.
Now only the drones remain, endlessly repeating their last orders.
slag_pits_sign_1: Protective gear required beyond this point.
Thermal vents may activate without warning.
slag_pits_sign_2: The furnaces here never stopped running after the collapse.
Something keeps feeding them from below.
data_vault_sign_2: The last backup of the old world's knowledge rests here.
The Archive Core guards it with lethal precision.
operator_overworld: I used to run comms for the whole sector.
The Comm Tower's gone dark. Nothing but static now.
If someone could get up there, maybe we could restore the signal.
smelter_overworld: The foundry heat keeps me warm, but the Slag Pits...
Something's stoking those furnaces from deep below.
I need thermal readings before anyone goes down there.
quest_comm_unlock_offer: The Comm Tower's been broadcasting interference for weeks.
I need someone to go in and find the source.
Head to the tower and report back what you find.
quest_comm_unlock_active: Have you reached the Comm Tower yet?
The entrance is northwest of here. Get in there and take a look.
quest_comm_unlock_complete: You made it inside? Good work.
Now I have a clearer picture of what we're dealing with.
quest_comm_unlock_done: The interference data you brought back was invaluable.
Stay sharp up there — the tower's far from safe.
quest_comm_boss_offer: My analysis shows a Comm Overlord controlling the tower.
It's hijacking every relay to broadcast its own signal.
Take it down and the tower's ours again.
quest_comm_boss_active: The Comm Overlord is still in control up there.
Find it in the tower and shut it down permanently.
quest_comm_boss_complete: Outstanding work. Here — you've more than earned this.
quest_comm_boss_done: Communications are slowly coming back online.
First clear signal in months. All thanks to you.
quest_comm_sweep_offer: The Overlord's gone, but Static Drones still patrol the halls.
Clear out 5 of them so my team can move in safely.
Should be routine after what you've already handled.
quest_comm_sweep_active: Those Static Drones won't clear themselves.
I need 5 of them eliminated before it's safe in there.
quest_comm_sweep_complete: My crew can start repairs. Here's your payment.
quest_comm_sweep_done: The Comm Tower is fully operational again.
We're picking up signals from sectors we thought were dead.
quest_slag_unlock_offer: The Slag Pits are overheating — way beyond normal levels.
I need someone to go down and take thermal readings.
Head to the pits and see what's causing the surge.
quest_slag_unlock_active: The Slag Pits entrance is to the far east.
Get down there and take those thermal readings for me.
quest_slag_unlock_complete: You survived the heat? Tough as titanium.
These readings confirm my worst fears.
quest_slag_unlock_done: Now we know what we're really dealing with down there.
quest_slag_boss_offer: The readings show a Slag Titan deep in the pits.
It's the one stoking the furnaces. The whole sector will melt.
You have to destroy it before the heat spreads further.
quest_slag_boss_active: The Slag Titan is still feeding those furnaces.
Get down to the deepest level and take it out.
quest_slag_boss_complete: The temperature's already dropping! You did it!
Take these — you'll need them for what comes next.
quest_slag_boss_done: The pits are cooling down nicely.
First time in years I can work without heat shielding.
quest_slag_sweep_offer: The Titan's gone, but Slag Crawlers still infest the vents.
Kill 5 of them so the cooling systems can stabilize.
Then we can finally shut down those furnaces for good.
quest_slag_sweep_active: Slag Crawlers are still clogging the vents.
I need 5 cleared out before the cooling kicks in.
quest_slag_sweep_complete: The vents are clear? The cooling systems are kicking in!
quest_slag_sweep_done: The Slag Pits are finally under control.
Temperature's stable for the first time in decades.
quest_vault_unlock_offer: You've proven yourself in the tower and the pits.
There's a place deeper — the Data Vault, through the Reactor Core.
Whatever's behind all this, the answers are in there. Go find them.
quest_vault_unlock_active: The Data Vault is beyond the Reactor Core.
Get in there and see what secrets it holds.
quest_vault_unlock_complete: You reached the vault? What did you find?
quest_vault_unlock_done: The vault's secrets are slowly making sense.
There's still more to uncover in there.
quest_vault_boss_offer: The Archive Core is the vault's guardian AI.
It controls everything — defenses, data locks, countermeasures.
Destroy it and we can access the old world's knowledge.
quest_vault_boss_active: The Archive Core is still active deep in the vault.
Find it and shut it down for good.
quest_vault_boss_complete: The Archive Core is offline? Do you realize what this means?
The data is ours. Here — take this.
quest_vault_boss_done: With the Archive Core down, we're decrypting everything.
The old world had secrets we never imagined.
quest_vault_sweep_offer: Firewall Sentinels are still guarding corrupted data nodes.
Take out 4 of them so we can recover the archives.
Every node recovered is another piece of our history saved.
quest_vault_sweep_active: Those Firewall Sentinels won't let us near the data.
Destroy 4 of them and the archives are ours.
quest_vault_sweep_complete: The data nodes are accessible! Years of lost knowledge, recovered.
You've done more for us than you know. Take this.
quest_vault_sweep_done: The archives are being restored, piece by piece.
Historians will sing your name. If any survive.
quest_nexus_gate_offer: You've cleared the tower, the pits, and the vault.
There's one place left — the Core Nexus, north of the settlement.
Whatever created all these machines... it's in there. End this.
quest_nexus_gate_active: The Core Nexus awaits to the north.
Find the Omega Core and destroy it. This ends now.
quest_nexus_gate_complete: You... you actually did it. The Omega Core is destroyed.
I never thought I'd see the day. Thank you.
quest_nexus_gate_done: The machines are shutting down across the sector.
For the first time in years, there's real hope.
